query:
SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS 
WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'badges' AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE();
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user U12DfRhAFBW6sMR.root --database LDLtnU3Ggjm84uQbZLmZ7C --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS 
WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'badges' AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE();
stdout:
COLUMN_NAME
id
name
description
icon
requirement_type
requirement_value
